---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new agent, provider, UI component, or capability
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this solve? Why is it needed? Describe the user pain point or capability gap.

## Proposed Solution
Describe your idea in detail. Include:
- New agent/tool/provider/component name
- Where it fits in the architecture (pipeline stage, UI section)
- Key interfaces / types it would need
- Configuration options

## Alternative Approaches
What other ways could this problem be solved? Why is your proposal better?

## Scope & Complexity
| Aspect | Estimate |
|--------|----------|
| Backend Changes | Small / Medium / Large |
| Frontend Changes | Small / Medium / Large |
| New Dependencies | None / Few / Many |
| Breaking Changes | No / Yes (describe) |
| Testing Effort | Low / Medium / High |

## Implementation Plan (Optional)
If you're willing to implement, outline the steps:
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Related Issues / Discussions
Link any relevant issues, PRs, or discussions.

## Additional Context
Mockups, diagrams, research papers, API docs, or anything else helpful.
